digest.title: Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now
OpenAI reduces Codex Model Context Size from 372k to 272k
Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
digest.tldr: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers.  The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools…
